---
title: "TRSE units: PET"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# PET

These paths are relative to `units/PET/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `input/key`
- `input/textbox`
- `os/interrupts`
- `os/model`
- `output/pbm`
- `output/screen`
